Class PersonDirector<T extends PersonBuilder<? extends Person>>

java.lang.Object
src.baseabstractions.AbstractDirector<T>
src.productcreation.PersonDirector<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of PersonBuilder this director works with
public class PersonDirector<T extends PersonBuilder<? extends Person>> extends AbstractDirector<T>
Director class for constructing Person objects with predefined configurations. Provides convenience methods for building fully initialized Person instances.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PersonDirector(T builder)
    Constructs a PersonDirector with the specified builder.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    makeFull(String name, long height, Color hairColor, Country nationality)
    Creates a fully initialized Person with all fields set.

  • Constructor Details

    • PersonDirector

      public PersonDirector(T builder)
      Constructs a PersonDirector with the specified builder.
      Parameters:
      builder - the PersonBuilder instance to be used by this director

  • Method Details

    • makeFull

      public void makeFull(String name, long height, Color hairColor, Country nationality)
      Creates a fully initialized Person with all fields set.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the person
      height - the height of the person
      hairColor - the hair color of the person
      nationality - the nationality of the person
